title: taraxacum westmanii
intro: Taraxacum westmanii, also known as Westman's dandelion or Icelandic dandelion, is a rare species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus Taraxacum. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, including its potential to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum westmanii include its ability to support liver function, improve digestion, and provide relief from symptoms associated with arthritis and gout. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal use in tea or tincture form, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of potential benefits and applications.
